strap: West Yorkshire Creative Industries draws £126m of UKRI lead-led funding across 93 grants, anchored by Leeds (41%), with Ionix Advanced Technologies and Opera North on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
